items.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
items.summary: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

items.title: WD’s compact 2TB portable SSD hits its lowest price since the hike at $200 (Reg. $310)
items.summary: Woot is now offering the 2TB Western Digital Elements SE portable SSD for $199.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). That’s down from the $310 price this model has been fetching at Amazon lately, knocking just over $110 off for roughly 35% in savings. While it regularly sold closer to $125 until November of last year, storage pricing has steadily climbed since then, with this particular model eventually reaching the $300 range. Today’s Woot deal marks the lowest price we have tracked since that hike, making it a notable chance to score a compact 2TB portable SSD for far less than the usual rates these drives have been fetching lately. Head below for more details.

items.title: Nomad sport, leather, and metal Apple Watch bands are up to 68% off with deals from $27
items.summary: Nomad has now refreshed its sale section with a host of notable and, in some cases, quite rare Apple Watch band deals. You’ll still find some solid price drops on latest leather iPhone 17 cases in there, but it has now updated the deals with offers on its Rugged sport band, the leather Modern Band, and even some of its steel and titanium bracelet style straps.

items.title: This modern queen bed frame wields integrated lighting, USB-C charging, more at $150
items.summary:
FLEXISPOT LED Queen Bed Frame with Charging Station

Buy for $150 (Reg. $220+)

What we love

We’ve covered sales on the king-size variant of this bed frame a few times now as it has dropped in price, but if you’d like to stick with a queen, here’s your shot for $150. For that price it packs LED lighting, charging ports, integrated storage cubbies, and what I consider to be sleek design.

items.title: Snag a spare fast USB-C Apple Watch charger with 20W wall adapter for only $10 (Save 57%)
items.summary:
LISEN USB-C Apple Watch Charger

Buy for $10 (Reg. $23)

What we love

If you could use a spare Apple Watch charging cable, this is an affordable way to get the job done by an affordable brand we’ve personally tested time and time again. For just $10, you get a fast USB-C Apple Watch charger and 20W wall charger, a price that’s hard to top if you ask me.

items.title: Your old office chair has seen better days, upgrade to this ergonomic heated massage unit for $171 (Reg. $380)
items.summary:
FLEXISPOT Ergonomic Massage Office Chair

Buy for $171 (Reg. $380)

Clip the on-page 10% off coupon. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This FLEXISPOT office chair delivers not only a modern ergonomic style, but also packs a built-in heated back massager. Another unique perk is the integrated coat hanger, which can help keep your office tidy.

items.title: OLIGHT’s mini magnetic Oclip EDC light w/ USB-C charging back at $28 Prime Day low
items.summary:
OLIGHT Oclip Pro EDC Clip-on Light

Buy for $28 (Reg. $40)

What we love

Now starting back down at the lowest price we have tracked on Amazon, these popular OLIGHT EDC flashlights deliver hands-free illumination just about anywhere with simple USB-C charging. It features three modes –  “floodlight with 500 lm, 120-meter range spotlight, and 40 lm red light” – alongside a lanyard hole and magnetic base “designed for clipping, hanging, and magnetic attachment.”

items.title: UGREEN’s new 65W Nexode Air is among the smallest chargers we’ve seen, now down to just $21.50 (46% off)
items.summary:
UGREEN Nexode Air 65W USB-C GaN Charger

Buy for $21.50 (Reg. $40)

What we love

UGREEN’s Nexode Air is a tiny 65W USB-C charger, which is great for anyone prefers a compact and portable form factor over other flashy features like a displays or touch controls. Its foldable prongs make it particularly travel-friendly, while the full 65W output is enough to handle phones, tablets, and a MacBook Air on the go.
